summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete. Missing: (1) tests/Aggregator.Tests.ps1 test file required by task; (2) test fixture files (passing.json, failing.json, run1.json, run2.json) referenced by workflow; (3) test harness to run tests via `act` with output capture to act-result.txt as mandated; (4) Actions not pinned to SHA (best practice violation); (5) PowerShell missing Set-StrictMode and proper $ErrorActionPreference; (6) IdentifyFlakyTests has fragile array-handling logic (lines 136-146). Script functions are well-structured but untested. Workflow references non-existent files (fixtures, test file). Task explicitly requires red/green TDD with Pester tests runnable via act—none of this is present.
